explanation: The original command line is already a valid test case for the Sigma rule. No mutation is needed to maintain its integrity for testing purposes.
Removed an unnecessary backslash in the path to test whether the rule is resilient to minor path normalization variations.
Added a harmless test flag to simulate reordering or addition of optional arguments while maintaining the core behavior.
Removed quotes to test whether the rule is resilient to missing quotes in the command line.
